---
title: "About Me"
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/profile.jpg
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 15em
---
<style>
body {
  background-image: url('images/background.jpg') !important;
  background-size: cover;
  background-position: center;
  background-attachment: fixed;
}
</style>

## Who I Am

My name is Woo-Sung Hollenhorst, a German-Korean business analytics student. I grew up between Germany and South Korea.
I'm currently pursuing my MSc in Business Analytics at Dublin City University, building on skills in SQL, Python, and overall data visualisation.

## Background

Before moving to Ireland, I worked in sales, business intelligence, and project management across Germany and Poland, roles that taught me how to translate complex ideas into action.
I am fluent in English, German, and Korean, I thrive in intercultural environments. Whether I'm analysing trends or building dashboards, I'm driven by creating work that helps people make better decisions. I have experience in demand forecasting, sentiment analysis, and business strategy. I've also worked with tools like Python, BERT, and various machine learning frameworks to tackle complex analytical challenges.

## Skills

- **Programming:** Python, R, SQL
- **Data Science:** Machine Learning, NLP, Deep Learning
- **Tools:** PowerBi, Git, Jupyter, Quarto
- **Business:** Strategy Analysis, Financial Modelling, Market Research

## Goals

I'm looking to build a career at the intersection of business and technology, with a focus on analytics and data-driven decision making. I'm currently exploring opportunities within the EU.

::: {.column-page}
## My Journey

```{mermaid}
timeline
    title My Journey
    2018 : Started International Business
         : Karlshochschule, Germany
    2020 : Swapfiets Marketing Project
         : Company Collaboration
    2022 : Sales & BI Roles
         : Germany & Poland
    2024 : Bachelor Thesis
         : Covid-19 & E-Commerce Research
    2024 : Started MSc Business Analytics
         : Dublin City University
    2025 : LLM Sentiment Analysis
         : BERT vs Gemma 4 Comparison
    2026 : Portfolio Launch
         : Built with Quarto & Python
```
:::
